items.description: Valuation result for a single deal on a given date

cleanValue.description: Clean value (market value excluding accrued interest)

accruedInterest.description: Accrued interest since last coupon date

realizedPnl.description: Realized P&L from closeout or settlement

dayPnl.description: Day P&L: today's MTM minus yesterday's MTM

calculatedAt.description: Timestamp when this valuation was computed

carryPnl.description: Carry P&L: accrued interest movement day-over-day

fxPnl.description: FX P&L: MTM change attributable to FX rate movement

fxRate.description: FX rate snapshot used for this valuation; null for base currency deals

producedBy.description: Provenance of an external plugin result; null for built-in valuators

version.description: Monotonic version number for this artifact name

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact bytes
